entry.title: Add Value Help with SAP Build Actions (free project)
entry.content:
Value help is one of the key features that can make a UI really friendly. Here's how to do it without much work, using the new integration of Actions with SAP Build Apps.

Even if you do not need value help, you can learn from this project:

  • Actions (including custom $filter)
  • 🆕 New page variables based on existing schema feature
  • Custom events
  • Popups (including showing/hiding and absolute positioning)
  • Layouting and positioning 
  • Events related to input box
  • 🆕 Integrating actions into SAP Build Apps 
  • Working with destinations to retrieve S/4HANA data
  • Paging and filtering

As always we will use the A_BusinessPartner entity so the user can easily select a business partner. The app has 2 ways to provide the value help:

🟪From within an Input Box:

🟪From another screen that lists all the business partners, using paging and filtering:

NOTE: This technique is good for an OData v2 service. You can do the same for a v4 service, though there you could use the CONTAINS keyword in the action or even skip the action and use a "Get record collection" to do the filtering work, since for v4 services this flow function provides the contains filtering option.

Much of the idea for this UI is based on a blog by @botazhat and her blog How to add a search bar with suggestions in SAP Build Apps. I have enhanced it by using actions, and making it work with v2 services and taking data directly from SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

 

Create Action for Getting Help Values

I think it is better design to use an action to get the help values since it.

  • Hides the API calls from the app developer
  • Hides the filtering syntax, which can be complex and different between OData v2 and v4
  • Makes the front-end development simpler

You can download the project, though it is quite simple to create yourself.

All you have to do to get started is create an action based on the BusinessPartner API service, and use the simple GET all business partners call from the A_BusinessPartner entity.

You will make a few small changes to make it easier to work with:

  • Add filterString as an input parameter to get a string to search in the business partner name.
  • Set defaults for some of the OData query parameters:
    • Set $top to 20, to retrieve only 20 matches at once (this can be overridden by the app)
    • Set $orderby to sort by BusinessPartnerFullName is ascending order (but you can change this)
    • Set $inlinecount to allpages, to return the total number of records, for the case where we paginate through the values.

For the filtering, we set the $filter input. Click the row, which opens the side panel. Then in the side panel, click to open the expression editor.

This will let you you set the $filter clause, either with a GUI or manually by typing in whatever you want.

This is the expression I used, to search for all matches on the BusinessPartnerFullName field using the value in filterString, and eliminating all business partners with no name. Note in v4 we would have had simpler syntax with the CONTAINS keyword.

substringof('${filterString}',BusinessPartnerFullName) eq true and BusinessPartnerFullName ne ''

Release and publish the action.

 

The Project

You can download the project we used to see how the UI, variables and logic. To use it, you'll have to connect your own deployed action. I've tried to make it as generic as possible.

There 2 pages, each providing a different way to get value help:

  • Home Page: Contains the form for business partner ID and name, plus the dropdown to search for a specific business partner.
  • Business Partners: Contains a list of all business partners that you can paginate through or search through.

And we have 2 app variables to store the business partner ID and name.

UI for Dropdown Help

For both pages, we create an integration to the action, and to the destination to be used with the action. Notice that here we create an integration to a destination without enabling any entities -- this was a little weird to me the first time I saw it. 

For variables, we have these:

  • Action_In and Action_Out are created automatically with the new feature that allows you to create variables from an action's schema.
  • filterString is the search string.
  • events is a way to control the updates when someone types fast and reduce the number of calls to the backend (write a comment if you want to learn more). 

And the logic is pretty simple with only 3 main flow functions (skipping all the flow functions related to the events variable):

  1. We capture when someone types in the search field (EVENT)
  2. We ignore when the search string is less than 3 characters (IF CONDITION)
  3. We then run the action (TRIGGER ACTION)
  4. We set the variable to hold the returned values (SET PAGE VARIABLE)

We also added some simple logic to handle when the user leaves the search box or presses escape (clear the value help) or when the user returns (run the original logic above with custom event). 

As for the UI, the main thing is the container holding the value help is absolutely positioned so it aligns with the input box:

And its visibility is set only when there are options to display:

UI for Selecting from All Values

Instead of using a dropdown, we added an icon at the end of the input box that navigates to a different page for selecting the business partner. 

This takes us to a separate page where we display all the business partners, and we can use filtering or paging to find the record we want.

This is the only logic we have, on the page logic canvas (except for clicking one of the business partners and returning to the home page).

When we come to the page we load all the business partners, and we have a custom event to refresh the page whenever we need to.

Then we have 3 flows when different page variables change:

  • User changes search string: We reset the page number to 1 and the OData $skip parameter to 0, and call the backend again.
  • User navigates to a different page: We recalculate the OData $skip parameter, and call the backend again.
  • System changes the # of retrieved records: We recalculate the number of pages we have. This occurs basically whenever we call the backend.

 

Room for Improvement

There are small things we could have done to make it even better:

  • Put the icon for the full business partner list inside the input box, making it a custom component (something Bota did in her blog)
  • Add multi-selection and wildcard characters
  • Package it to make it more generic for any data entity

Also, I wanted to eliminate flashing when the user enters a search string, and there was a tradeoff between the flashing and the speed. I might change my calculus to make it faster.

I'll work on these. In the meantime, tell me what you thought of these techniques, including how you would improve them.

😸

entry.title: Re: SAP CHOTA TALKS HYDERABAD 2025 (Q2) - Hyderabad Coming Soon
entry.content: Interesting and how to registered for an event ? Also would appreciate if slogan can have some local telugu touch.

entry.title: Re: Requirement is stop receiving mail on Outlook but no...
entry.content: But PR and PO it has more than one approval person and requirement is stop for specific person , only in outlook . If any thing did in task level it impacted to other people also . requirement is only stop mail in outlook for single ID only .

entry.title: Re: Setup of FP2502 fails on new Windows Server
entry.content:
Hi markus_schaefer242 

Could you try clean reinstall of server tools as per below notes:

SAP Note 3281014 - How to Check Service Layer is Functioning as Expected

2538555 - How to Perform Clean Reinstall of SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA Server Components

If installation still fails, please create ticket using component SBO-BC-SLD and upload fresh install logs from below folders:

Windows:

Versions below SAP Business One 10.0 SP 2311

  • C:\Program Files (x86)\SAP\SAP Business One ServerTools\Common\tomcat\logs\

SAP Business One 10.0 SP 2311 and higher version

  • C:\Program Files\SAP\SAP Business One SetupFiles\tomcat\logs
  • %programdata%\sap\SAP Business One\Log\SAP Business One ServerTools\System Landscape Directory\

Linux:

  • /var/log/SAPBusinessOne/ServerTools/SLD/
  • /usr/sap/SAPBusinessOne/Common/tomcat/logs/

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Do i need to create an index CDHDR?
entry.content: It's a database-dependent question. Please tag your question with the concerned database. Note that you should first test your application with real data and then analyze if any performance issues.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ User Report
entry.content:
If you are still on the Quote 1.0 engine, you could use the Report Module to create a custom report. 
The USERS table has columns LastLoginTime and DateCreated. A little bit of SQL will give you what you need. 

You can even add Year and Month separately, in order to display it on a column chart, like so: 

,DATENAME(year, ISNULL(u.LastLoginTime,u.DateCreated)) AS LastActivity_Year
,CAST(MONTH(ISNULL(u.LastLoginTime,u.DateCreated)) AS INT) AS LastActivity_Month
,CASE WHEN u.LastLoginTime IS NULL THEN 'Logged in' ELSE 'Created, never logged in' END AS LastActivityType

Note, the third line will give you a column that you can then filter based on whether they've ever logged in or not.


If you are already on the Quote 2.0 engine - I do not know. I know that the Report Module is not available there. I'm also assuming that the underlying database is structured differently, so even with the script workbench, you'd have to navigate the database to find the names of relevant tables and their columns. If you find out or anyone else knows, I'd love to know, because we're planning on transitioning to 2.0.

entry.title: Re: Could not play Bite size videos on CPQ - Configure Price Quote
entry.content: You could try submitting a helpdesk request. https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/incident/create

entry.title: Re: How to identify inactive users in system?
entry.content: I get an error at this link...

entry.title: How to calculate CALM sizing for health monitoring , job monitoring , real user monitoring
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

We want to know that how can we calculate / predict the sizing of Cloud ALM that would be required for health monitoring , job monitoring , real user monitoring scenario.

 

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to calculate CALM sizing for health monitoring ,...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

Thanks for contacting SAP.

I would like to double check what do you mean by "calculate / predict the sizing of Cloud Alm ",

are you expecting to know how you can monitor the memory consumption in SAP Cloud ALM?

It is possible by using "Health Monitoring" under Cloud ALM,

see details under KBA 3432729 How to Monitor SAP Cloud ALM Memory Usage

We provide step-by-step details for that.

 

Please feel free to let me know when further inquiries.

 

Best Regards,

Sunny

entry.title: SAPA HANA Import schema error USERLOCen,column ambiguously defined:
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an SAP HANA schema from SAP B1 version 10 FP2208, I exported the schema then try to import on new Server with SAP B1 version 10 FP2502 HF1, but I encountered this error, tried to search for a solution but I found nothing, I appreciate your help, thanks

Could not execute 'IMPORT "SBOLIVE_TEST"."*" AS BINARY FROM '/backup/SBOLIVE_TEST' WITH IGNORE EXISTING THREADS 10' in 26.918 seconds .
SAP DBTech JDBC: [2048]: column store error: import failed: [30111] Import failed (could not execute create statement);object=HAN::SBOLIVE_TEST:USERLOCen,column ambiguously defined: Code: line 2 col 3 (at pos 9) at ptime/query/checker/check_id.cc:1379

entry.title: What's new: SAP Best Practices for SAP Integrated Business Planning – 2505
entry.content:
Welcome to the latest updates on SAP Best Practices for SAP Integrated Business Planning (IBP). In this blog, we will highlight the significant enhancements and updates introduced with release 2505. In the following sections, you will find the details. 

Enhancements in the SAPIBP1 Sample Planning Area:

In the latest updates to the SAPIBP1 sample planning area, several enhancements have been introduced.

  • The new attribute named Forecast Algorithm has been added to the customer source master data type. This attribute is intended to record information about the statistical forecast algorithm that was most recently utilized. To enable this feature, you must include it as a parameter in the Statistical Forecasting application job template. Here is an illustrative example of how it can look like.

Usage of new attribute Forecast Algorithm

  • Until now, you only had the option to maintain a static input for target service levels. With the introduction of the new key figure Target Service Level – Time-Varying, along with an updated profile setting in the inventory profile app, you can now implement time-varying customer service level targets. This innovative feature enables you to maintain different values for the target service levels, for example, due to seasonality, shifting demand patterns or changing business priorities over time. Here is an example where you can find the setting in the inventory profile.

New setting in inventory profile app

  • By adding the IBP_ADD_TIME_DIMENSION function to the forecast bias key figures we support additional reporting capabilities in inventory optimization.
  • To enhance the user experience within the Planner Workspace, we have refined the display settings for several service level key figures used in inventory optimization. These key figures are now displayed as percentages in Planner Workspace, thereby improving clarity and usability for planners.

Inventory Budget Entitlement 

With the 2505 release, we are excited to introduce a new solution process called IBP for inventory – inventory budget entitlement (7UL). This new solution process allows for the integration of budgetary constraints within the inventory planning process. Incorporating inventory budget into the inventory planning process enables you to effectively balance service level targets with your available budget. This approach ensures better-informed financial decisions regarding the maintenance of safety stock levels while adhering to an acceptable predicted service level.

The new solution process offers several advantages, including:

  • Aligning inventory planning with financial constraints and improving budget adherence
  • Providing transparent insights into the trade-offs between service levels and budgetary restrictions
  • Setting safety stock levels to maintain cost efficiency while considering customer demands.

To facilitate this new solution, we are introducing a new workbook for inventory planning within the Planner Workspace. This workbook comprises multiple tabs that display essential key figures for this process, such as the available budget for each product family and location region, distributed budget per location product, or safety stock recommendations based on the available budget. The budgeted safety stock recommendation also serves as one input to calculate the predicted service level. Additionally, you can visualize the results in a dedicated page within the Analytic Story for Inventory. This page effectively demonstrates the distribution of the budget and the impact of budget limitations on service levels.

Here are some screenshots that offer a glimpse into the new solution process. The first screenshot displays the available budget per location region and product family.

Planner Workspace: Available Budget

In the next screenshot, the budget is disaggregated to the level of location product using a new copy operator. By utilizing different calculated key figures, the budgeted safety stock recommendation is determined.

Planner Workspace: Budget Disaggregation

The result is used as input for the service level prediction operator and is displayed in the corresponding planning view.

Planner Workspace: Service Level Prediction

In the new page of the analytic story for inventory planner, you can analyse the result using powerful analytic charts.

Analytic Story for Inventory - page Inventory Budget Entitlement 1

Analytic Story for Inventory - page Inventory Budget Entitlement 2

Time-Series-Based Forecast Consumption 

We are pleased to announce the launch of a new planner workspace designed specifically for the solution process IBP for sales and operations – time-series-based forecast consumption (3RT). This workspace serves as an alternative to the existing planning view available through the SAP IBP Microsoft Excel add-in. Within this new workspace, users will find both input and output key figures used in the forecast consumption profile.

Planner Workspace: Forecast Consumption

SAP Process Navigator

The final point I want to mention is an enhancement of the existing solution process flows available through the SAP Process Navigator. The enhancement focuses on the S&OP process, making it easier to navigate through the various process steps.

Here some more useful links:

  • Highlight video of the new solution process for Inventory Budget Entitlement is available here
  • SAP Signavio Process Navigator to download all assets of SAP Best Practices for SAP Integrated Business Planning
  • Never heard about SAP Best Practices for SAP Integrated Business Planning – check out this short video for more information
  • In case you want to learn more about SAP Best Practices for SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain I recommend our blog series. The first blog is available here.

Thank you for reading our release highlights blog. Stay tuned for more updates and enhancements in future releases.

entry.title: Re: While creating a sales order I am getting an error as...
entry.content:
Yes, funds management is active

Yes, commitment management is active 

Account assignment objects (e.g., cost center, internal order) is also valid and active

The requirement is for SD processes not to check for budget availability

entry.title: Re: Credit checks available in SAP Credit Management (FSCM)
entry.content: Thank you for providing detailed information on credit management.

entry.title: SAP Solution Manager 7.2 SP14 on Netweaver 7.4 compatibility with S4 HANA 2023 FPS03
entry.content:
We are currently on S4 PERSON_NAME DIGITS FPS 00 and planning an upgrade to S4 PERSON_NAME DIGITS FPS 03.


 


The S4 PERSON_NAME system is integrated to SAP Solution Manager system which is on Solman 7.2 SP14 on Netweaver 7.4


Can you please confirm if there any issues with compatibility or would a SP or netweaver upgrade on Solution Manager system would also be required along with the S4 PERSON_NAME system.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Solution Manager 7.2 SP14 on Netweaver 7.4 compat...
entry.content:
Dear customer, 

Based on the information provided, there is no requirement to upgrade your SAP Solution Manager 7.2 SP14 (on NetWeaver 7.4) in order to integrate your upgraded S/4HANA 2023 FPS 03 system as a managed system.
This combination is fully supported for standard functionalities of SOLMAN.

Best regards,
Sylas
SAP Support

entry.title: SAP Community Escape House for May - ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Welcome to the Developer Challenge for the Month of May!!!! The 👉 SAP Community Escape House has a new addition!!

Hope you all escaped alive from the SAP Build Escape House last month 😀 . So now let us relax by extending our living room this month.

SAP Community Escape House

We will be focusing on ABAP with an emphasis on Extensibility. Like previous challenges, we will explore a crucial topic that allows customers and partners to tailor SAP standard software to their business needs. Extensibility covers various aspects, including:

  • Adjusting software behaviour beyond standard configurations.
  • Extending the data model.
  • Exposing additional data.
  • Modifying UI layouts, forms, and reports.
  • Creating new UI elements and applications.

You can get more details on Extensibility and the various options available by watching this video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IPEotH-6ekI&t=786s

 

Task 0 – Preparation

We hope all of you might remember the 2024 ABAP Developer Challenge which was focused on ABAP CDS where we had created an end to end Fiori List Report from a database table. This year will take a further step and explore developer extensibility on the same Travel demo data.

  1. Refer Task0 of the 2024 ABAP Developer Challenge to complete the prerequisites.
  2. Create the objects mentioned in the readme.md file in SAP GitHub Repository for the base data model which will be extended.
  3. Now you will have a table, a structure, a view and a data generator class.

For this year, all SAP Developer Challenges created by the Developer Advocates will happen in the SAP Community Escape House (shout out to @nicoschoenteich for his amazing creativity). Each month we will unlock a new room in the house with a specific focus. Completing a challenge means successfully escaping the room by solving a series of coding – or no-code – tasks/questions. This month let us explore ABAP Extensibility.

Here are the links to our previous challenges:

  • January: UI5 
  • February: Integration Suite
  • March: AI
  • April : Build

How to participate

Visit the SAP Community Escape House and enter your numeric SAP Community user ID.

If you don't know your user ID, click Need Help? This will display a link to your community settings page.

Then you will see your ID here:

Once you see the SAP Community Escape House, select the ABAP Living Room.

SAP Community Escape House - Available rooms

The user interface of an escape room includes the room itself as well as a terminal. You can click the objects in the room to receive tips. Like in a real (physical) escape room, you will have to try out a few things and explore the room until you receive helpful tips and, eventually, instructions. These tips and instructions are printed in the terminal next to the room. The terminal is also used to submit solutions to tasks. Read the instructions you receive carefully to understand how.

SAP Community Escape House - ABAP room

If you successfully escape the room (you will know when that happens), you will receive a badge in the SAP Community. We will assign the badges once the challenge closes.

 

The schedule

The ABAP room will be unlocked on May 5th and will stay unlocked until the end of the year. However, the challenge closes on May 31st, so you will have to escape the room until then to qualify for a badge. Unlike the previous year, this SAP Developer Challenge does not consist of weekly sub-challenges. The next room (next challenge) will be unlocked in June.

 

Useful links for the challenge

  1. https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/acquire-core-abap-skills/extending-dictionary-objects_b0c9bfa6-d415-408c-baed-2f15fb3a977f
  2. https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/acquire-core-abap-skills/extending-cds-views_fab548c5-6438-41e1-8384-c5190f13ea7b
  3. https://www.youtube.com/shorts/dnAALtV0FCE
  4. https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/developing-unit-tests-for-cds-view?locale=en-US

Good luck and happy escaping!

entry.title: Convert output xml to pdf document
entry.content:
Hi,

I have used the example I found:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/web-service-calls-to-get-customer-invoice-pdf-from-bydesign/ba-p/13358353

to retrieve a Document however have struggled to find something that will then 'convert' this to an actual .PDF file.

Does anybody know how this is done please ?

 

 

 <DocumentOutputRequestXML>
                <DocumentUUID>0bb7f0f9-45b8-1fe0-80fb-27d1d04e8b7e</DocumentUUID>
<OutputXMLData>PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIiBlbmNvZGluZz0idXRmLTgiPz4KPG4wOkZvcm1JbnZvaWNlUmVx
dWVzdCB4bWxuczpuMD0iaHR0cDovL3NhcC5jb20veGkvU0FQR2xvYmFsMjAvR2xvYmFsIiB4bWxu
czpwcng9InVybjpzYXAuY29tOnByb3h5OkxRMTovMVNBSS9UQUUzNjlCOEZBODE4NUM5NDNFMzBD
Mzo4MDQiPgogIAogIDxDdXN0b21lckludm9pY2U+CiAgICAKICAgIDxXYXRlcm1hcmtOYW1lPjwv
V2F0ZXJtYXJrTmFtZT4KICAgIAogICAgCiAgICA8SUQ+Nzc8L0lEPgogICAgCiAgICAKICAgIDxQ
cm9jZXNzaW5nVHlwZUNvZGU+Q0k8L1Byb2Nlc3NpbmdUeXBlQ29kZT4KICAgIAogICAgCiAgICA8
UHJvY2Vzc2luZ1R5cGVOYW1lIGxhbmd1YWdlQ29kZT0iRU4iPkludm9pY2U8L1Byb2Nlc3NpbmdU
eXBlTmFtZT4KICAgIAogICAgCiAgICA8UmVjZWl2YWJsZXNQYXlhYmxlc1Byb3BlcnR5TW92ZW1l
bnREaXJlY3Rpb25Db2RlPjI8L1JlY2VpdmFibGVzUGF5YWJsZXNQcm9wZXJ0eU1vdmVtZW50RGly
ZWN0aW9uQ29kZT4KICAgIAogICAgCiAgICA8UmVjZWl2YWJsZXNQYXlhYmxlc1Byb3BlcnR5TW92
ZW1lbnREaXJlY3Rpb25OYW1lIGxhbmd1YWdlQ29kZT0iRU4iPkluY3JlYXNlPC9SZWNlaXZhYmxl
c1BheWFibGVzUHJvcGVydHlNb3ZlbWVudERpcmVjdGlvbk5hbWU+CiAgICAKICAgIAogICAgPERh
dGU+MjAyNS0wMy0xODwvRGF0ZT4KICAgIAogICAgCiAgICA8RGVzY3JpcHRpb24gbGFuZ3VhZ2VD

c2luZXNzVHJhbnNhY3Rpb25Eb2N1bWVudElEPjc3PC9SZWZlcmVuY2VCdXNpbmVzc1RyYW5zYWN0

ZWxlYXNlU3RhdHVzTmFtZSBsYW5ndWFnZUNvZGU9IkVOIj5SZWxlYXNlZDwvUmVsZWFzZVN0YXR1
c05hbWU+CiAgICAgIAogICAgCiAgICA8L1N0YXR1cz4KICAgIAogICAgCiAgICA8U2VsbGVyUGFy
dHk+CiAgICAgIAogICAgICA8SW50ZXJuYWxJRD5HQi1QQVA8L0ludGVybmFsSUQ+CiAgICAgIAog

ZXNzRGVzY3JpcHRpb24+UGFwZXJncmFwaGljcyBMdGQgLyBDcm9tcHRvbiBXYXkgLyBDcmF3bGV5
IFJIMTAgOVFSIC8gR0I8L0Zvcm1hdHRlZEFkZHJlc3NEZXNjcmlwdGlvbj4KICAgICAgICAKICAg

CiAgICAgICAgICAKICAgICAgICAgIAogICAgICAgICAgPERlc2NyaXB0aW9uPkNyb21wdG9uIFdh

entry.title: Local Client copy error
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are copying a local client in our testing system. After selecting profile and source client 000, we click on start immediately button.

After this, it gives a wizard for client copy.

We configured all the required details.

 After successfully completing all the steps, it did not dump error but agains pops a wizard.

Due to this, we are unable to copy a local client.

Please find attached document for step to step configuration of local client copy.

 

Regards,

BASIS Team

entry.title: BRBACKUP: Return code 0005 Error during processing
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have an issue with offline backup with db13.

It got terminated with a return code 0005.

I have added the detail log here.


Detail log: bfqyyhdo.afd

BR0280I BRBACKUP time stamp: 2025-05-01 10.40.35
BR0063I 34 of 35 files processed - 20360.236 MB of 20366.713 MB done
BR0204I Percentage done: 99.97%, estimated end time: 10:40
BR0001I **************************************************
BR0201I Compressing E:\oracle\A01\origlogA\\cntrl\cntrlA01.dbf
BR0203I to E:\oracle\A01\sapbackup\bfqyyhdo\cntrlA01.dbf.Z ...
#FILE..... E:\oracle\A01\origlogA\\cntrl\cntrlA01.dbf
#SAVED.... E:\oracle\A01\sapbackup\bfqyyhdo\cntrlA01.dbf.Z #1/35 175.3283:1 38734
BR0280I BRBACKUP time stamp: 2025-05-01 10.40.35
BR0063I 35 of 35 files processed - 20366.713 MB of 20366.713 MB done
BR0204I Percentage done: 100.00%, estimated end time: 10:40
BR0001I **************************************************

BR0304I Starting and opening database instance A01 ...
BR0280I BRBACKUP time stamp: 2025-05-01 10.40.48
BR0305I Start and open of database instance A01 successful
BR0117I ARCHIVE LOG LIST after backup for database instance A01
Parameter Value
Database log mode Archive Mode
Automatic archival Enabled
Archive destination E:\oracle\A01\oraarch\A01arch
Archive format ARC%S.%T
Oldest online log sequence 666
Next log sequence to archive 669
Current log sequence 669 SCN: 10647077
Database block size 8192 Thread: 1
BR0202I Saving space_log
BR0203I to E:\oracle\A01\sapbackup\A01 ...
BR0278E Command output of 'E: && cd E:\oracle\A01\sapreorg && E:\usr\sap\A01\SYS\exe\run\brtools.exe -f p
cpio: Directory "E:\oracle\A01\sapbackup\A01": The system cannot find the file specified.
BR0280I BRBACKUP time stamp: 2025-05-01 10.40.48
BR0279E Return code from 'E: && cd E:\oracle\A01\sapreorg && E:\usr\sap\A01\SYS\exe\run\brtools.exe -f pr
BR0222E Copying space_log to/from E:\oracle\A01\sapbackup\A01 failed due to previous errors
BR0202I Saving E:\oracle\A01\sapbackup\bfqyyhdo.afd
BR0203I to E:\oracle\A01\sapbackup\A01 ...
BR0202I Saving E:\oracle\A01\sapbackup\backA01.log
BR0203I to E:\oracle\A01\sapbackup\A01 ...
BR0115I Compression rate for all files 4.6156:1
BR0056I End of database backup: bfqyyhdo.afd 2025-05-01 10.40.48
BR0280I BRBACKUP time stamp: 2025-05-01 10.40.49
BR0054I BRBACKUP terminated with errors

Can anyone help with this.

Thank you

regards

Ananth.

entry.title: Restricting BADI Error Message Trigger During PM Notification Workflow Approval Process
entry.content:
I have implemented an approval workflow for the PM Notification process in the system. The workflow allows users to manually change the notification status, but only after the approval is granted. If approval is not granted, I have set up a mechanism to trigger an error message through a BADI (Business Add-In), which helps to prevent any changes to the notification status until the approval process is completed.

Once the approval is granted, I use a custom ABAP class to automatically change the status of the notification. The class is designed to invoke a BAPI (Business Application Programming Interface) to update the status of the notification based on the workflow approval. This is done through a workflow task, which ensures that the status change is carried out as part of the approval process.

However, the issue I am facing is that the BADI error message is still being triggered within the custom class, even when the workflow is in progress and the status is being changed automatically after approval. This error message is preventing the system from updating the notification status, even though the workflow has already been approved. The BADI logic is interfering with the workflow's task of changing the status automatically.

What I need to do now is to restrict the BADI from triggering once the workflow has been initiated and is in progress. The BADI error message should only be triggered if the workflow has not been approved or if it's outside the workflow process. Essentially, I need to implement a check to ensure that the error message is not triggered during the workflow approval process, allowing the status change to happen seamlessly as part of the workflow task.

The ideal solution would be to check the workflow status within the BADI or custom class, ensuring that the status change can happen without interference when the workflow is running. This way, the workflow process will remain smooth, and the status change will only be prevented when appropriate conditions are met.

entry.title: Re: SAP DRC Statutory Reporting: Setting up correct periodicity of GB_VAT_DCL
entry.content: Hi Phil. What is the error message number you are receiving. If possible please raise and incident for this issue. We can take a look at the reason for the error. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Extend S/4HANA Material Master with Custom Fields and...
entry.content:
Hi Mohamed,

For transferring the fields, you need to enhance the SOA or IDOC structures in respective systems and implement BADI to fill data to the outbound structures from MDG and similar to inbound systems to receive the values.

You can refer to the below blog to understand how to go about it.

How to Enhance the standard SOAWEBSEVICE IN SAP MD... - SAP Community

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: MAINTENANCE RESOURCE SCHEDULING - AUTOMATIC SCHEDULING
entry.content:
LIST OF WORK ORDERS AVAILABLE FOR NEXT 4 WEEKS

1)

2)

RESPECTIVE WORK CENTERS AVAILABLE CAPACITY AND CAPACITY LOAD FOR ABOVE OPERATIONS .

CREATING A NEW SCHEDULE

SCHEDULING VIEW AFTER CREATION OF SCHEDULE

WORK CENTER UTILIZATION PERCENTAGE IN RESPECTIVE SCHEDULE

DOING SCHEDULE AUTOMATICALLY

AFTER AUTOMATIC SCHEDULING OPERATION STATUS

IN ABOVE 4000542/0020 WAS NOT SCHEDULED AND GIVEN MSG IS BELOW

I COULD UNDERSTAND DUE TO THIS OPERATION WENT TO DUE 400542/0030 WAS NOT SCHEDULED.

SAME MESSAGE WAS GENERATED FOR 4000543/0030, 4000544/0010 ALSO.

AFTER SCHEDULING WORK CENTER UTILIZATION PERCENTAGE:

UTILIZING PERCENTAGE WAS NOT ABOVE 100 BUT OPERATION WAS NOT SCHEUDLED. AS PER MY UNDERSTANDING IN AUTOMATIC SCHEDULING OPERARATION CAN SCHEDULE WITHIN SCHEDULING DAYS(5 TO 11). SO OPERATION SHOULD HAVE BEEN SCHEDULED ON 6TH,7TH,8TH (9TH AND 10TH NON-WORKING DAYS). BUT IT THROWS ERROR.

KINDLY HELP ON THIS, PLS EXPLAIN WHY APPLICATION BEHAVE IN THIS WAY.

DRRTT3 WORK CETNER CAPACITY VIEW

IF IAM WRONG PLS EXPLAIN THE AUTOMATIC SCHEDULING IN DETAILED WAY. 

ALREADY I WALKED THROUGH SAP MAUALS. I COULDN'T FIGURE OUT THE REASON FOR THIS BEHAVIOUR.

entry.title: Re: SAP Language Pack
entry.content:
Hi, Sami

You do not have to maintain the translations for the standard fields, by enabling the language packages, these would be maintained automatically.

If you want to customize some of the fields, then you can refer to this KBA:
https://me.sap.com/notes/2576546

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Version Update
entry.content:

Thank you for your answer.
What I mean was about tools like UI5Lint for example.

entry.title: Re: "Script Task" are now available in SAP Build Process Automation.
entry.content:
Yes, thanks.
I have just realized that all custom variables need to be defined first in the Process Details. Compared to Workflow Management, it is not very intuitive 🙃 Thanks for the hint!

entry.title: Re: SAP SF EC TIME MANAGEMENT
entry.content:
Hi, Xavier

There are several ways you can configure the workflows:

1. Under time type object, you can define the workflows for each time type just like your screenshot.

workflow implementation guide:

https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-employee-central/implementing-and-managing-workflows/workflows-in-sap-successfactors-employee-central?version=2505

2. You can also configure a MDF rule under Employee Time object to define the workflows:

https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-employee-central/implementing-time-management-in-sap-successfactors/time-off-workflow-rules?version=2505&q=workflow

3. Or you can just leave the workflow fields blank under Time Type and define your own workflows under Employee Time object just like Case 2.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Connector 2.18 is out!
entry.content: Almost for sure there will also be a 2.18.1 release. For each feature release (2.xx.0) there were at least 2 patch releases (2.xx.1 and 2.xx.2) published in the past. I do not see a reason why this release strategy would change.

entry.content:
i have an error message below when i was trying to do Gr from a purchase order in MIGO:

"Posting only possible in periods 2025/05 and 2025/04 in company code B310

Message No. M7053"

 

i have checked MMRV, it show i am in the current month which is 2025/05 but i am still getting the error message. see screenshort below from the transaction page

entry.title: SAP Sales Cloud v2 - Extension fields from Account for Quote Printform
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are using SAP Sales Cloud v2, and one of our tasks is to add the Account External ID to the Quote print form. In Version 1, it was possible to define an extension scenario for a custom field and use it in the Quote object as well.

But how can this be done in SAP Sales Cloud v2? I don't see the custom account fields in the Quote object. Which tool should I use? An External Hook? But if I understand correctly, that leads to additional calls to CPI. I also don't see any custom fields from other objects available via Determination.

Thanks

Alex

entry.title: Re: Try to update ShippingMethod via DI-Api to -1 in orde...
entry.content:
Hi Swen_Koegler,

According to SAP Note 2623612: 

If you use ShippingMethod = -1 in the DI program, it will take the Shipping Type from Item Master Data of the line. This is by-design behavior.

If you want to set Shipping Type as empty, you should use the following:

oSO.Lines.ShippingMethod = -2;

Hope it helps!

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: How to assign users to specific group in target system via transformation in IAS
entry.content:
While provisioning users to target system in Identity Authentication (IAS), there is a need to automatically assign users to specific group in target system. So, the source system for us is SuccessFactors and Target System is IAS also we are using Identity Authentication SCIM API version 1. Any of the user created in Source System should automatically get created in Target system. 

So the 1st condition any user with the mail id '@gmail.com' should get assigned into one group named as 'Workzone_user' in IAS .

2nd Condition Any user with userType as Employee should get assigned to same group ('Workzone_User') in IAS .

We followed the 2984603 - How to assign users to specific group in target system via transformation - SAP for Me this sap note &  SAP Help Portal this blog and tried writing the transformation code as follows:

{
  "condition": "$.userType =~ /.*Employee.*/",
  "constant": "Workzone_User",
  "targetPath": "$.groups[0].value"
},

{
  "condition": "$.emails[0].value =~ /.*@gmail.com/",
  "constant": "Workzone_End_User",
  "targetPath": "$.groups[1].value"
},

Soley if only 1st condition is also working that is also fine for that specific condition to work we wrote this code but after we ran the job still it was failing 

{
"condition": "$.emails[0].value =~ /.*@gmail.com/",
}

Following are the configuration we have done in target system properties: 

Please let us know where we are going wrong or what approach needs to be followed here for the transformation.

Hi,

The permission details are available in the CPM help document

https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-performance-and-goals/using-continuous-performance-management/role-based-permissions-for-continuous-performance-management

Permission Location:

 CPM User Permission -> Access for CPM Performance Data and Performance Page

CPM User Permission ->  Access Continuous Feedback Data and Feedback Page

 

Regards,

M.Jeyasudha

entry.title: Automatic Mapping of User Story and Requirement in SAP Cloud ALM Test Cases
entry.content:
Ideally all User story and Requirements mapped in Business Process should be transferred or inherited while creating a Manual Test Case in SAP Cloud ALM. How do we achieve this?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Automatic Mapping of User Story and Requirement in SA...
entry.content:
Currently SAP Cloud ALM does not offer functionality to automatically link Test Cases to Requirements or User Stories for a Process. 

Requirements and User Stories can be assigned to Test Cases manually in several locations:

  • Assign one or more existing Test Cases to a single Requirement from the Requirement details view in the Requirements app.
  • Assign one or more existing Test Cases to a single User Story from the User Story details view in the Tasks app. 
  • Assign one or more User Stories or Requirements to a Test Case using the relevant tabs in the Test Case details view of the Test Preparation app

If you wish to influence the future development of SAP Cloud ALM and provide direction to our Developers in relation to this topic, please use the options outlined in this KBA:
3391676 - SAP Continuous Influence for SAP Cloud ALM

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Intent Based Navigation
entry.content:
@RaminS 

The following document describes how to dynamically change navigation targets using a controller extension.

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/a12ad6058db84e8cb60a3a9b2ade63fb

entry.title: Re: Active Directory Plus On Prem - Integration
entry.content:
Hi Kathleen, 

What exactly are you looking to integrate? The user onboarding? Email creation, SP creation? In previous engagements I have helped to design and configure the identity lifecycle management with EC and AD, specifically to provision users from SuccessFactors Employee Central into Active Directory (AD) and Microsoft Entra ID, with optional write-back of email address to SuccessFactors.

If you could give me a description of what you are looking to automate/integrate I can try and help you. 

KR
Michael

entry.title: Enterprise Management Layer for SAP S/4HANA - New Release (OP2023 - FPS03) Announcement
entry.content:
Our enterprise management layer template based on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition OP2023 has been upgraded to FPS03 and will soon be available for customer to buy from SAP.

The new release does not include any major scope item updates (addition, updates, obsolete), but provides a upgraded template with the latest OSS notes provided by FPS03.

In the context of Localization, the following documents/scope items have been updated:

  • EML_2023_DRC01_BPD_EN_XX_V1.3
  • EML_2023_LOC01_BPD_EN_XX_V1.3
  • EML_2023_LOC07_BPD_EN_NO_V1.3
  • EML_2023_LOC11_BPD_EN_CO_V1.3
  • EML_2023_LOC11_BPD_EN_HR_V1.3
  • EML_2023_LOC11_BPD_EN_IN_V1.3
  • EML_2023_LOC11_BPD_EN_PL_V1.3

Below is an overview of the latest updates in the context of Localization:

CountryFeatureScope Item
AUeDocuments for Supplier Self-BillingDRC01
BEBank Number and Bank Accounts ValidationLOC01
CNCreate Golden Tax DocumentsLOC01
COMagnectic Media files - DIAN 1001-1003-1005 to 1009LOC11_CO
COVAT DeclarationLOC11_CO
COTax CodesLOC11_CO
DENew format for VAT ReturnLOC01
DEProcessing Electronic Supplier Invoices Received via e-mailDRC01
DKVAT Return (New Format)LOC01
ESAnnual VAT Declaration - Form 390LOC01
ESModelo 303 format updatesLOC01
ESConsistency ChecksDRC01
FIBank Number and Bank Accounts ValidationLOC01
FRAudit File - France (FEC)LOC01
FRBank Number and Bank Accounts ValidationLOC01
GBElectronic Submission of CIS300 ReportLOC01
GBWindsor FrameworkLOC01
GBVAT Registration Number Handling for EU Sales into Northern IrelandLOC01
HReInvoice (B2G)LOC11_HR
HUEC Sales and Purchases List FormatLOC01
HUVoiding Electronic DocumentsDRC01
INGeneration of eWay Bills and eInvoicesLOC11_IN
ITInvoice Data Declaration (Esterometro)J58
KRConsolidation of Electronic Amendment Tax InvoicesDRC01
LUNew Tax Code for Reverse Charge at 17%LOC01
LUPeriodic VAT Return (Special Scheme)LOC01
MXeDocumentsDRC01
MYElectronic Customer Invoices and Buyer-Issued: Tax Authorities ClearanceDRC01
NLNew format for EC Sales List and VAT ReturnLOC01
NOSAF-T Version 1.30LOC07_NO
NZeDocuments for Supplier Self-BillingDRC01
NZBank Number and Bank Accounts ValidationLOC01
PHComputarized Accounting System (CAS) ReportsLOC01
PHSummary List of Importation ReportLOC01
PLFixed Asset Forms – Define Output PagesLOC01
PTDigital Signature – Reversal of Financial Accounting DocumentLOC01
PTEnhanced Validation of Tax Data in SAF-T CustomizingLOC01
ROStandard Audit File - Taxation (SAF-T) Business Partner MaintenanceLOC01
ROFixed Asset FormsLOC01
SACommercial Registration Number Maintenance at Branch levelDRC01
SAVAT Return FormatLOC01
SAGenerate electronic document for Supplier Self-BillingDRC01
SGGST Return Submission with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, Cloud EditionLOC01
SGElectronic Invoicing with Peppol PINTDRC01
SKTax Rates Changes (2025)LOC01
THDedicated Customer Email Addresses for Sending Electronic Invoices and ReceiptsDRC01
TRView PDF before electronic document submission and use of specific cancellation reasons.DRC01
TWBusiness Administration Number (BAN) or Unified Business NumberLOC01
TWGUI Formats and GUI NumbersLOC01
XXCustomer eInvoicing – submission via emailDRC01
XXOffsetting Account DeterminationLOC01
XXDeferred Tax Transfer ImprovementsLOC01
XXCash Flow StatementsLOC01
XXBusiness Partner Maintenance -  Tax StatusDRC01

entry.title: Cost Center Standard Hierarchy Change from CE2502 in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
As of version 2502, the default standard hierarchy changes for new cost centers.

Before version 2502, when you created a new cost center, it used to be assigned to standard hierarchy 0001 by default, which is a hierarchy based on a set of cost center groups.

With version 2502, the default behavior changes:

  • If you don't have existing cost centers created in previous versions, new cost centers you create are assigned to a newly created global hierarchy with the topmost standard hierarchy node 1.

    To view this standard hierarchy, use the Manage Global Hierarchies app.

  • If you do have existing cost centers, all new cost centers you create continue to be assigned to standard hierarchy 0001 by default, just as the existing cost centers.

    You can also move the existing cost centers to the new global hierarchy, if needed. For details, see How to Migrate Cost Center Groups to Global Hierarchies.

The error "0001 is reserved for standard cost center group. Specify a different ID." will be triggered when creating cost center group 0001. If 0001 is required as the cost center group, it is recommended to follow 3594285 - Error "0001 is reserved for standard cost center group. Specify a different ID." - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - SAP for Me to create it in the Manage Global Hierarchy app under standard hierarchy node 1 as a subnode. 

Furthermore, Set Report Relevancy app & Replicate Runtime Hierarchy are needed for old SET groups, e.g., manage cost center groups, manage profit center groups. For hierarchies in Manage Global Hierarchy app, those steps are not needed. They can be used in analytical reports after activated in Manage Global Hierarchy. If you want to use them as SET Groups like cost center groups, set flag for corresponding hierarchy which is set ‘X’ for standard cost center hierarchy by default. 

Details can be checked in below Help Portal links: 
Cost Center Standard Hierarchy | SAP Help Portal
Set-Based Groups versus Global Hierarchies | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Fiori Tiles for AC01/AC02/AC03/AC06
entry.content:
Hello Members,

Is there any FIORI App / Tile for AC0* transactions. Transactions (AC01,AC02,AC03,AC06) related to service master dint have any tiles when searched in FIORI App library. 

Can anyone confirm for AC* transactions, we have to use only through GUI / Is there anything I am missing either from searching / enabling the APP.

 

Regards

Kishore.

What went well?

What could I improve on?

Any additional comments?

entry.title: Re: ASP.NET Report Viewer & multiple IIS Worker Processes

It would be helpful to others if this was documented more clearly, as my exhaustive searching was unable to find mention of it.

thanks again.

entry.title: Re: Issue in SAP Build Process Automation action sending...
entry.content:
@sk8869 

When you modify the action, release and publish it, the project version is updated. Make sure to update the dependency of the project that uses the action as well.

entry.title: No Notification Sent to Requestor After Approval/Rejection in Flexible Workflow (Sales Doc. S4/HANA
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are currently using Flexible Workflow for sales documents, and the approval process is generally working as expected in the Fiori environment.

Approvers can view the documents pending their action through the My Inbox app and are able to approve, reject, or send back for reprocessing. When ı accept or reject sales order , The requester is not notified. For example, whether your order is approved or rejected.

SO, after the approver makes a decision (either approve or reject), the requestor does not receive any kind of notification.

Fiori notification is triggered. I completed nofitication settings, no problem

Nothing appears in the requestor’s My Inbox or Notifications section indicating the outcome.

We would like the requestor to be informed when the status of the document they submitted changes.
Is there a way to enable this kind of notification automatically within the standard functionality?

Worfklow senario send you;

Any suggestions or experience shared would be highly appreciated.


Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Issue in SAP Build Process Automation action sending...
entry.content: @MioYasutake, i updated the dependency of the project but still had the same issue.

entry.title: Re: SAP SF EC TIME MANAGEMENT
entry.content:
Hi ElenaL,

I tried everything you said, but the workflow is not getting triggered.

entry.title: Re: Off Rental Period for ReFX Contracts
entry.content:
Hi Ajay,

The best approach for this, rather than to mess around with the dates of the original condition type (e.g. Rent), is to create a separate condition type called e.g. Rent Abatement (some customers prefer Rent Free or Rent Discount).

This condition type is a copy of the RENT condition type but with the inverse entries. So in V_TIVCDFLOWTYPE you'll maintain D/C indicator in reverse, e.g.

Rent        Credit Posting

Rent (+)   Credit Posting

Rent (-)    Debit Posting

for the Rent Abatement you would use:

Rent Abatement       Debit Posting

Rent Abatement (+) Debit Posting

Rent Abatement (-)  Credit Posting

etc.

In V_TIVRAACCDET you would have to do the same where you swap around the debit and credit account symbols.

This way on the contract you can leave the RENT condition untouched and for any temporary rent free, or discount you use the RENT ABATEMENT condition type using the start and end date for the duration of the discount.

This is very clean and gives better financial reporting as you can actually report on how much discount has been given/received.

Regards, Andre

entry.title: Re: How to do the Synchronous B2BCustomer replication fro...
entry.content:
Hello Madukar,

while SAP Commerce Cloud only offers asynchronous InOnly processing for B2B customer replication OOTB, you can set up a fully synchronous OData call in the back office or via an extension that uses the return channel and delivers the response immediately.

The rough roadmap looks like this:

You would need to perform the following steps (roughly):

1) SAP Integration Suite: Configure an iFlow (Request-Reply).

2) SAP Commerce: Destination + OutboundChannelConfiguration with ExchangePattern = InOut.

3) Create a cron job in the back office and switch to the new channel.

I hope you could understand the approach roughly and if you have further questions feel free to ask

Best regards

Dennis

entry.title: HTTP Client is not connceted in S/4HANA 1909
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

We are using the SAP DRCce product and have followed all the necessary configuration steps for S/4HANA 1909 as outlined in the Help Portal:
"https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-edition/sap-document-and-reporting-compliance-cloud-edition/integrate-cloud-edition-with-sap-s-4hana".

However, when submitting an e-invoice via transaction code EDOC_COCKPIT, we encounter the message: "HTTP client is not connected".

We have checked dev_icm, dev_w*, dev_rfc*, and the system log, but there are no related error messages.

Is there an expert who can help resolve this issue?

entry.title: Re: Odata API External Scheduler Integration Problem
entry.content:
hello s4clearning,

an 500 error can have several causes. The first step is to create a successful request in Postman.

First, I would check whether your base URL is correct.

Unfortunately, the base URL isn't visible from your Postman screenshot, as the problem could be that you're using an incorrect URL or accessing the System-Tenant instead of the Application-Tenant.

This is what a URL looks like on the system tenant: https://<mysystem>-sut.hana.ondemand.com/…

and this is what the URL on the application tenant looks like: https://<mysystem>.hana.ondemand.com/…

Because I think the service you need is only installed on the Application-Tenant, you should also adjust the base URL accordingly.

I hope this has given you some helpful suggestions for correcting the problem.

Best regards

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Cost Center Standard Hierarchy Change from CE2502 in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Hi, don't forget the ~ in the standard Hierarchy if you do this via the migration.

entry.title: Re: Go for your quick win! Migrate Identity Provisioning tenants to SAP Cloud Identity infrastructur
entry.content:
Hi Ivelina, it's a pretty cool blog and you are absolutely right, the fear of change ist fear of the unknown, basicly. If you are running only a few cloud services or systems for a while and the time to migrate comes nearer, your IdP comes within a bundle, maybe WEBIde , maybe Sales cloud, maybe SAC, not sure with which, you only have a few apps, let me say Jam and SAC active, AD inactive, it seems to be easy and fast done. But if you have a look in IAS, the JAM entry is already there, obviously, I'm not really sure why, what's the reason and, that's the main point! What will happen, if I want to choose to migrate Jam too? 1 Source, 1 Target, 0 Proxy. 

Thank you very much

Kind Regards

Uwe

entry.title: Re: Issue in SAP Build Process Automation action sending...
entry.content: @sk8869 In your process, have you mapped any values to the input parameters of the action?

entry.title: Sales Return on the basis of Tax Invoice in Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am Facing the below issue in Sap public cloud.

My client is getting the sales return from the customer after rejection of material, but the condition is that they are receiving the sales return against Tax Invoice. that means every time the customer issuing the invoice against the Rejection of material. So plz advise how can do the transaction in a system and for configuration i need to do or any pricing procedure need to maintain in a system

Thanks, and Regards

Mani Sajnani

entry.title: Re: Unexpected Crystal Reports Error: Invalid Printer Spe...
entry.content:
Hi Don,

Firstly, thank you for replying to my thread. Here are some of your answers belows:

We have tried two different Zebra Printers.

1) Zebra ZT410-203dpi ZPL (Seagull Drivers and Zebra Original Drivers Tested - Networked TCP/IP)

2) Zebra ZD420-203dpi ZPL (Seagull Drivers and Zebra Original Drivers Tested - USB Connection)

3) The A4 worksheet printer is a HP LaserJet Enterprise E50145 but the CR runtime is as far as I am aware required for the labels printing part of it.

The application we are using is CMM (Careflow Medicines Management from SystemC) on a Windows desktop not server.

We have tested on 3 different Dell OptiPlex machines all producing the same Crystal Reports errors, 2 were Windows 11 24H2 and 1 Windows 10 22H2.

The printer job status shows no jobs in the queues.

entry.title: Re: "Script Task" are now available in SAP Build Process Automation.
entry.content:
Could you please also support me with the following question?
How can I implement looping in a BPA process?
In Workflow Management, it was possible to create a manual loop depending on the array length, for example.

 

 

Unfortunately, I haven't found a way to do the same in BPA Process.
I would really appreciate any tips or guidance.

entry.title: how to default cost center to a FS item
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How to default Cost center to a FS item in group reporting 

Regards,

Inthiyaz Shaik

entry.title: STO Process Error
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am facing an issue for one of my client that whenever client is doing STO process he is facing an issue in calculation .

Calcuation Value – System show wrong 1583* 1,858.59 = Rs 2,942,142.31

Actual Value should be 1583* 1,858.59 = Rs 2,942,147.97

Based on wrong Calcuation GST Value is also comes Wrong

Kindly advise what i need to do, currently we are giving advice to the client to do the price change through MR21 and round off the material price 

Thanks

Mani Sajnani

entry.title: Re: Cost Center Standard Hierarchy Change from CE2502 in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: informative ..

entry.title: Re: Collected information about reclaim / shrink / defragmentation topic in context of SAP HANA pers
entry.content:
Hi @Laszlo_Thoma ,

Thank you for putting everything together.

However I just wanted to highlight below point -

When executing a shrink for a standalone system, ALTER SYSTEM RECLAIM DATAVOLUME ‘host:xxxxx’ 120 DEFRAGMENT is enough.

However ,  When system replication is used, there are typically snapshots preserved and as a consequence the RECLAIM DATAVOLUME command may / will fail.

We have to follow SAP Note 2332284 for required steps to perform a successful RECLAIM DATAVOLUME in context of an active system replication.

Thanks,

Mofizur

entry.title: Re: Collected information about reclaim / shrink / defragmentation topic in context of SAP HANA pers
entry.content:
Hi @MRahaman 

Thank you for your reply. The mentioned SAP Note

  • 2332284 - Data volume reclaim failed because of snapshot pages

is listed in the What are the known issues? section of the Blog post.

Regards,
Laszlo

entry.title: Re: Collected information about reclaim / shrink / defragmentation topic in context of SAP HANA pers
entry.content:
Hi @Laszlo_Thoma ,

Yep, I saw that but I was suggesting to add that point in the main body of your document as a disclaimer or notes could be useful. 

That's my personal view.

Thanks again!

Mofizur Rahaman

If you're interested in submitting a lecture, please follow the link for the form here: https://forms.gle/c984eRtxGAx8k3pz5

Pedro

entry.title: Since i am fresher, i cant be able to perform Scope ID 3NR
entry.content:

can anyone help me out on this????

entry.title: Re: Could not play Bite size videos on CPQ - Configure Price Quote
entry.content: Thanks for notifying, its been been informed to the colleagues to fix the issue.. I will let you know once its fixed

entry.title: Re: Convert output xml to pdf document
entry.content: An XML document is not freely interchangeable with a .pdf directly. You either need to render the form or use some type of library to do the conversion, and one of your tags contains base64 encoded data.

entry.title: Re: Community Member Spotlight: Marssel Vilaça - April 2025 Edition
entry.content: @Marssel700 Marssel is a Community Consultant! He truly embodies the spirit of the SAP Community and instills this desire in other consultants. Congratulations @Marssel700 Marssel!

entry.title: Re: Collected information about reclaim / shrink / defragmentation topic in context of SAP HANA pers

Regards,
Laszlo

entry.title: Re: How to use ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud as a developer in an on-premise system
entry.content:
@IngoPfeiffer All depends on how the BTP ABAP Environment is used. You can have the dev environment act as a playground to experiment with new checks, systems, configurations, etc. and then have the target setup in the production environment - stable, with limited access to given to users.

The question is if there's a way of transporting configurations between instances - that I'm not sure, we might need @OlgaDolinskaja to assist 🙂

entry.title: Re: Issue in SAP Build Process Automation action sending...
entry.content: @MioYasutake, yes i have mapped the input in action used in process and then released and deployed the process

entry.title: Re: Assembly Subcontracting Process in Production Planning - SAP S/4 HANA
entry.content: A very Good Document. Thank you.

entry.title: Bill of exchange payment request print out in France (Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hello,

in France (and as far as I know also in Spain and Italy) specific type of bill of exchange is used to collect incoming payments (LCR/Lettre de change classique). It's a special bills of exchange receivable that requires printing BoE paper by us (seller), instead of customer. This bill is then sent to the customer and must be returned signed by him.

For that purpose new payment method with special G/L BoE indicator = 'R' was created in SSCUI = 101972

Set Up Payment Methods for Each Country/Region for Payment Transactions). This method works fine and after successful payment run a noted item with special G/L =R is created.
Unfortunately, I don't see anywhere in the system or in the S4HC documentation any option to generate a BoE request printout. The ‘Bill of Exchange’ step in ‘Output parameter determination’ refers to the BoE presentation, rather than sending the document to the customer for acceptance.

Is there any predefined template for printing BoE request? Is there an option in Public Cloud to print such a document? What application object should be used for assigning print out template?

 

Thank you very much in advance for any support in this matter.

entry.title: Re: Premium Hub CoE – DSC Knowledge Bits – New Migration Guide LE-WM to EWM on S/4HANA
entry.content:
Thanks for the summary . Is there any migration tool for customizing when we move from Decentralized EWM to Embedded EWM . 

Regards

Krishna

entry.title: Re: What's New in SAP Asset Performance Management 2411
entry.content:
Hello @kate_dowle 

Thank you for this great overview. 

Are you also planning to give some insights in regards to the set-up of the AI driven Images integration ? which is resulting the Image derived measurements within the technical object 360 

if s not part of the plant then any further documentation on that aspect would be very appreciated.

Thank you again and best regards,

Franck

entry.title: MD61(Create PIRs) Planning period Items
entry.content:
Hello Members,

Please tell me about Planning Period Items.

Items "D" and "T" look the same.

Is there any difference in behavior between these two?
How should I use them?

 

I would be grateful if you could help me.
Thank you in advance.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Industrial Manufacturing

entry.title: Re: SAPA HANA Import schema error USERLOCen,column ambigu...
entry.content:
Hi alucard 

The import error indicates, that it was not possible to create the object "SBOLIVE_TEST:USERLOCen" due to scenario documented in SAP Note 2552712.

Please apply changes to the object described in referenced SAP Note or exclude it from schema export for successful import.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Fiori Tiles for AC01/AC02/AC03/AC06
entry.content:
Hi Kishore,

seems that there are none, according to that answer from SAP-Support from September last year:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/need-fiori-app-id-for-service-master/qaq-p/13855570

you can try using those transactions via web gui in the launchpad if they are suitable for it. Have a look at this:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-fiori-steps-to-configure-custom-fiori-app-for-any-sap-t-code/ba-p/13564618

entry.title: Re: Adaptation Project for Custom Fiori element application
entry.content:
no bsp for adaptation project.

I don't remember there is  url to launch the adaptation project directly.

entry.title: Re: Update Crystal Reports to use later version of Micros...
entry.content: Was this requirement ever removed? The website here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html that says 'Note: SP 21 and 26 had important updates that, like other support packs, apply to support packs after them.' in conjunction of point 5 of SP26's changelog implies it is still required. And I can find nothing in the change logs suggesting the requirement was ever removed. But in my own testing on a clean OS, the CR for VS runtime installs and runs fine. Or will some particular function fail to work? ie. what is TraceLog used for? Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SECURE 2.0 – IRS Proposed Regulations on Catch-Up-As-...
entry.content:
As detailed on note 0003470796 (BEN: SECURE 2.0 Act - Section 109):

https://me.sap.com/notes/0003559844

To stay informed about legal changes, access the regulatory change manager

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Order - System Status released CDS
entry.content:
Hello @mhumaj 

 

There is no CDS view released for System Status of a Maintenance Order unfortuntely .

 

The API API_MAINTENANCEORDER;v=2 and Entity MaintenanceOrder has a field 

"SystemStatusText": which returns a status like "CRTD NMAT PRC"

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: How can I use SAP BTP (Business Technology Platform) to extend CRM functionality in a custom CRM sol
entry.content: How to use SAP BTP
